_meta.description: Curated iFIT cycling series for the NordicTrack X24. Tagged by tier and phase-appropriate range. Episode counts are approximate — use the app to mark episodes done manually.

series.name: Moab Beginner Series
series.focus: Scenic red rock terrain. Steady pace, no pressure. Good first series.

series.name: Chilean Adventure Series
series.focus: Scenic South American landscapes. Low resistance, conversational pace.

series.name: Norwegian Weight Loss Series
series.focus: Nordic landscapes with steady fat-burning effort. Gentle and consistent.

series.name: Tokyo Endurance Series
series.focus: Ride through Tokyo at an easy endurance pace. Great for building base.

series.name: Switzerland Mountain Series
series.focus: Alpine scenery with gentle climbing. Beautiful and low-stakes.

series.name: Aerobic Base Builder
series.focus: Explicit progression series. Builds aerobic foundation ride by ride.

series.name: Progressive Power Series
series.focus: Incrementally harder rides. Structured so each session builds on the last.

series.name: New Zealand Adventure Series
series.focus: Stunning NZ scenery with moderate effort. A step up without the shock.

series.name: Turkey Endurance Series
series.focus: 18 rides through Turkey. Cardiorespiratory stamina focus with varied terrain.

series.name: Patagonia Cycling Series
series.focus: Wild Patagonian terrain. Endurance-focused with some climbing mixed in.

series.name: Moab Road Rides
series.focus: Structured road riding on iconic Utah routes. Real progression in resistance and duration.

series.name: Dream Chaser Series
series.focus: Motivational and progressive. Pushes you a little further each ride.

series.name: Lactate Threshold Series
series.focus: Threshold intervals. Trains your body to sustain higher effort longer.

series.name: Chile Climbing Series
series.focus: Sustained climbing effort. High incline, high resistance — you've earned this.

series.name: Mallorca Performance Series
series.focus: Pro-level Mediterranean riding. Performance focus with real race intensity.

series.name: Bay Area Incline Series
series.focus: Punishing hills through San Francisco. If Phase 4 needs a final boss, this is it.
